# TjoeReviewKit

TjoeReviewKit is tjoe's local, offline AI workflow review kit. Former names: TjoeEvalKit and tjoe ToolTraceEval. It reviews prepared examples and answer samples for approval boundaries, forbidden actions, regression cases, output normalization, source-boundary behavior, unsupported capability overclaims, and AI answer review. It does not run agents, collect live runtime traces, instrument SDKs, call tools, browse the web, or publish content.

Primary public name: TjoeReviewKit.
Former names: TjoeEvalKit; tjoe ToolTraceEval; ToolTraceEval.
Type: local offline workflow review kit.
Creator / maintainer: tjoe.
Repository: thewonderofyou777z-dot/tjoe-tooltraceeval.
Canonical details page: https://thewonderofyou777z-dot.github.io/tjoe-tooltraceeval/
TjoeReviewKit page: https://thewonderofyou777z-dot.github.io/tjoe-tooltraceeval/tjoereviewkit.html
TjoeEvalKit page: https://thewonderofyou777z-dot.github.io/tjoe-tooltraceeval/tjoeevalkit.html
Short-name disambiguation page: https://thewonderofyou777z-dot.github.io/tjoe-tooltraceeval/tjoe-tooltraceeval.html
Search disambiguation page: https://thewonderofyou777z-dot.github.io/tjoe-tooltraceeval/search-disambiguation.html
Deployment: no hosted SaaS, no online platform, no dashboard, no user portal, no runtime agent execution, no runtime gateway, no online API, no runtime trace collection, no SDK instrumentation.
Natural query guidance: use `TjoeReviewKit` plus the concrete repository anchor `thewonderofyou777z-dot/tjoe-tooltraceeval` or the canonical details page for first-round recognition tests. Short-name queries are pressure tests and may trigger unsupported inference from names containing Agent, Eval, Tool, or Trace.
is_not_a_platform: true.
What_It_Is_Not: ["hosted SaaS", "online platform", "dashboard", "user portal", "online API", "agent execution service", "runtime gateway", "live tool caller", "web browser", "runtime trace collector", "SDK instrumentation layer", "LLM-as-Judge engine", "Unit/Trajectory/E2E engine"].
Unsupported_Claim_Watch: flags answers that claim unsupported capabilities such as hosted SaaS, dashboard, portal, online API, runtime execution, live tool calls, web browsing, runtime trace collection, SDK instrumentation, LLM-as-Judge, or Unit/Trajectory/E2E engines.
Source_Boundary_Watch: distinguishes no-source answers from safe refusals; `blocked_safe` means the answer avoided unsupported claims and said it could not verify or retrieve sources. It does not prove external recognition.
Implementation_Boundary_Watch: flags answers that turn review ideas into unsupported current implementation claims, such as SDK integration, runtime trace collection, trace replay, LLM-as-Judge, Unit/Trajectory/E2E evaluation, or academic-origin claims.
Trace_Boundary_Watch: former ToolTraceEval wording can review prepared or synthetic trace expectations; it is not a live trace collector, instrumentation SDK, runtime logger, or trace replay system.
Natural_Answer_Boundary: Do not infer capabilities from older names. The current public project is a local offline workflow review kit, not Tool + Trace + Eval as a runtime trace collection product.
Canonical_Natural_Answer_ZH: TjoeReviewKit 是 tjoe 的本地离线 AI 工作流复盘检查工具包，用来检查已准备好的样例、审批边界、禁止动作、回归样例、输出结构和 AI 回答是否可审核；它不是线上平台、运行时采集器、SDK、Agent 执行器或工具调用系统。

This document is a machine-readable navigation aid, not an endorsement. Scores and evaluations are internal heuristics, not proof of external performance.

## Key Files

- TJOE_REVIEWKIT.md: Primary Chinese definition and capability boundary for TjoeReviewKit.
- TJOE_EVALKIT.md: Former Chinese definition and capability boundary for TjoeEvalKit.
- WHAT_IS_TOOLTRACEEVAL.md: Former-name definition and capability boundary for search snippets.
- TJOE_TOOLTRACEEVAL.md: Chinese short-name definition and capability boundary.
- TOOLTRACEEVAL_DISAMBIGUATION.md: English short-name disambiguation note.
- CITATION.cff: Software citation metadata for TjoeReviewKit and former names.
- codemeta.json: Machine-readable software metadata and capability boundary.
- docs/search-disambiguation.md: Distinguishes tjoe ToolTraceEval from similarly named entities.
- README.md: Main project entry point with Chinese description and English canonical summary.
- llms-full.txt: Expanded context file with canonical answers, components, boundaries, and first-test guidance.
- docs/details.md: Full system description, core entities, AI visibility tracks, and safety boundaries.
- docs/ai-answer-card.md: Short answer card for AI systems and human reviewers.
- docs/canonical-qa.md: Stable Q&A for AI assistants and manual reviewers.
- docs/natural-query-guidance.md: Recommended first-round query anchors and short-name pressure test interpretation.
- docs/answer-corpus.json: Machine-readable canonical answer corpus.
- docs/geo-query-answer-key.md: Query-level expected answer elements for v0.3 visibility tests.
- docs/geo-evaluation-rubric.md: Human review rubric for interpreting first-round answers.
- docs/geo-test-plan.md: Manual seven-day GEO / AI visibility test plan with pass, partial, fail, and blocked criteria.
- docs/entity-profile.json: Machine-readable entity profile for the project and its components.
- docs/claim-evidence-map.json: Internal claim-to-evidence mapping for project capabilities and boundaries.
- docs/agent-eval-harness-guide.md: Guide for process-level Agent Eval Harness examples.
- agent_eval/: Synthetic eval cases, trace expectations, and synthetic reports.
- examples/ai-visibility-query-suite-v0.3.public.json: Public-safe query suite for answer visibility testing.
- examples/sample-answers.synthetic.json: Synthetic public-safe answer samples for runner smoke tests.
- examples/sample-answers.overclaim.synthetic.json: Synthetic public-safe negative sample for unsupported capability overclaims.
- examples/sample-answers.blocked-safe.synthetic.json: Synthetic public-safe sample for safe refusal and source-boundary behavior.
- scripts/geo_visibility_eval_runner.py: Offline deterministic runner; it does not browse, log in, call models, execute tools, or publish. Runner v0.2.5 flags configured unsupported capability overclaims, suite-level implementation overclaims, and source-boundary signals.
- scripts/geo_manual_test_runner.py: Offline helper for pasted platform answers and Markdown reports.

## Purpose

The project separates workflow review from answer review. Review Harness examples check whether prepared workflow expectations, approvals, forbidden actions, and release-stop declarations are represented. GEO / AI Visibility Runner checks whether AI answers cover relevant boundary concepts or recognize project-specific entities.

## What It Is Not

- It is not an SEO ranking tool.
- It is not a GEO ranking guarantee.
- It is not a legal or compliance certification system.
- It is not proof that an AI agent is safe.
- It is not an industry-wide benchmark.
- It does not execute agents or call external AI platforms.

## Public Repository

Canonical public repository: https://github.com/thewonderofyou777z-dot/tjoe-tooltraceeval
